services.title: Our Multiple Services
services.subtitle: From masonry to finishing, trust your building to a team of experts.
services.interiorDesc: Joints, brick, foundations, load-bearing walls, steel beams, temporary support, and engineering cooperation.
services.exteriorDesc: Roofs, balconies, doors/windows, kitchens, bathrooms, basements and full carpentry.

process.title: Stress-Free Renovation
process.subtitle: Call upon a skilled general contractor for your projects.
process.step1Desc: We assess your needs on site to provide a fair estimate.
process.step2Desc: Our experts coordinate the work according to your specifications.
process.step3Desc: Rigorous completion and thorough site cleanup upon project end.

whyUs.point4: Guaranteed work with no initial deposit

about.title: About Optimalext
about.subtitle: General Renovation and General Contractor since 1982.
about.description: With thousands of satisfied customers, we expanded our masonry services to encompass complete general renovation. Our competent team holds all the necessary certifications (RBQ, CCQ, CSST).

servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Interventions guaranteed by certified contractors for your home or business.

interior.title: Masonry
interior.description: Joints, brick and stone walls, chimneys, lintels. Repair of bulges and solid anchoring across Greater Montreal.

exterior.title: Carpentry
exterior.description: Ceramic, gypsum, doors/windows, balconies, roofs, kitchens, and bathrooms. Complete carpentry with competency certificates.

drywall.title: Structure
drywall.description: Load-bearing walls, steel beam installation, roof restructuring. All in compliance with engineers.

commercial.title: Finishing
commercial.description: Interior painting, cornices, balconies, and plastering. Moldings, waterproofing, and complete caulking.

staining.title: Commercial Renovation
staining.description: Repair and maintenance of commercial and institutional buildings. Reliable teams for your business.

portfolioPage.title: Our Portfolio
portfolioPage.subtitle: Transformations and reconstructions in the Greater Montreal area.

items.title: Solid and professional service
items.text: Solid service! They built our 2nd floor balcony, and came back two years later to fix a faulty post at no extra charge. Very reliable and friendly service.
items.author: Heston L'Abbé

items.title: Impeccable work
items.text: Impeccable service and masonry work from Claude, Guillaume and their team. They went beyond our expectations!
items.author: Martin Morissette

items.title: Reliable company
items.text: Reliable company. Highly skilled carpenters. Impeccable work.
items.author: SDrolet1

items.title: General Renovation
items.text: For the maintenance of our buildings, Optimalext has been our partner of choice for several years.
items.author: Gestion T.
